title: Operator Property
description: This sets or returns the trigger conditions for Force Trigger Objects.
notes:
When OR conditions are selected, the trigger is pulled when any one of the conditions active in the XX_Enable Property is met.

When AND conditions are selected, the trigger is pulled when all of the conditions active in the XX_Enable Property are met.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Trigger

Number Property
examples:
Function Test_Operator Integer iVar FSet FT1.Fx_Enabled, True ' Activates X axis FSet FT1.Fy_Enabled, True ' Activates Y axis FSet FT1.Operator, FG_AND ' Sets the trigger condition to an AND condition FGet FT1.Operator, iVar ' Confirms the current trigger conditions Print iVar
Fend
